privileged_info_summary: The task uses real dive profile data (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) sourced directly from the official Subsurface GitHub repository, though setup_task.sh dynamically deletes buddy names from Dives 3 and 5 to create a synthetic task scenario. The explicit task requirements (filling buddies with 'David Price', tagging dives deeper than 18m, changing to imperial units, and exporting a CSV) perfectly match the provided metadata, although the verifier.py contains a known bug in depth extraction that expects a non-existent 'depth' attribute on the <dive> tag instead of checking inside the <divecomputer> child element.
